working_definition: A mature basal keratinocyte of the fetal interfollicular epidermis distinguished by expression of DPYSL2 and AGR2, increasing after 11 PCW. Positioned along the ORS/CL differentiation trajectory downstream of POSTN+ basal cells, giving rise to outer root sheath and companion layer cells during hair follicle development.

best_match.cl_definition: A mitotically active, columnar-shaped keratinocyte located in the stratum basale of the epidermis and attached to the basement membrane.

justification: CL:0002187 is the closest existing term. The DPYSL2+ basal cell is a specific fetal maturation state along the ORS/CL trajectory, distinguished by DPYSL2 and AGR2 expression and a late-gestation temporal profile. No CL term captures this specific state.
recommendation: Use CL:0002187 (basal cell of epidermis) as a broad match.
